title: inputs
description: Inputs used to select or evaluate an analog IC. Mirrors the SAS / CTAS inputs structure: a required designRequirements seed plus optional operatingPoints (the conditions under which the part's own dissipation / junction temperature are evaluated). outputs[i] aligns positionally with operatingPoints[i].

operatingPoint.description: One operating condition relevant to the analog IC's own dissipation and thermal state.

supplyVoltage.description: Total supply voltage (V+)-(V-) at this point, in V.

signalFrequency.description: Signal / sampling frequency at this point, in Hz.

loadCurrent.description: Output load current drawn at this point, in A.
